predicate_mappings.assigned_physician: the physician {} is assigned to the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.primary_assignment_confirmed: the primary assignment for {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.nursing_assessment_completed: the nursing assessment for {} is completed
predicate_mappings.diagnostic_order_finalized: the diagnostic order is finalized for {}
predicate_mappings.bundle_ready_for_execution: the bundle is ready for execution for {}
predicate_mappings.sample_pending_collection: the sample is pending collection for {}
predicate_mappings.physician_compatible_with_encounter: the physician {} is compatible with the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.test_compatible_with_encounter: the test type {} is compatible with the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.medication_compatible_with_encounter: the medication {} is compatible with the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.supply_compatible_with_encounter: the supply {} is compatible with the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.device_compatible_with_encounter: the device {} is compatible with the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.container_compatible_with_encounter: the container {} is compatible with the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.culture_media_compatible_with_encounter: the culture media {} is compatible with the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.support_role_compatible_with_encounter: the support role {} is compatible with the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.antibiotic_reserved_for_encounter: the antibiotic {} is reserved for the encounter {}
predicate_mappings.adult_encounter_flag: the encounter {} has an adult flag
predicate_mappings.pediatric_encounter_flag: the encounter {} has a pediatric flag
predicate_mappings.bed_assigned: the bed {} is assigned to the encounter {}

activate_sepsis_encounter.description: activate sepsis encounter for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only activate sepsis encounter for a sepsis encounter A if it is not the case that the encounter A is triggered and it is not the case that the bundle is completed for A
effects: Once I activate sepsis encounter for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the encounter A is triggered

assign_primary_physician.description: assign a physician B as primary physician to a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only assign a physician B as primary physician to a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the physician B is available and the physician B is compatible with the encounter A
I can only assign a physician B as primary physician to a sepsis encounter A if it is not the case that the primary assignment for A is confirmed
effects: Once I assign a physician B as primary physician to a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the physician B is assigned to the encounter A and the primary assignment for A is confirmed
Once I assign a physician B as primary physician to a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the physician B is available

unassign_primary_physician.description: unassign a physician B from primary physician role for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only unassign a physician B from primary physician role for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the physician B is assigned to the encounter A

I can only unassign a physician B from primary physician role for a sepsis encounter A if it is not the case that the diagnostic order is finalized for A and it is not the case that the bundle is ready for execution for A
effects: Once I unassign a physician B from primary physician role for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the physician B is available

Once I unassign a physician B from primary physician role for a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the physician B is assigned to the encounter A and it is not the case anymore that the primary assignment for A is confirmed and it is not the case anymore that the nursing assessment for A is completed and it is not the case anymore that the specimen for A is collected and it is not the case anymore that the sample is pending collection for A and it is not the case anymore that the bundle was administered during A and it is not the case anymore that the specimen for A is verified

assign_bed.description: assign a bed B to a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only assign a bed B to a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the bed B is available
effects: Once I assign a bed B to a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the bed B is assigned to the encounter A
Once I assign a bed B to a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the bed B is available

release_bed.description: release a bed B from a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a bed B from a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the bed B is assigned to the encounter A
effects: Once I release a bed B from a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the bed B is available
Once I release a bed B from a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the bed B is assigned to the encounter A

complete_bed_dependent_assessment.description: complete bed dependent assessment for a sepsis encounter A using a bed B
preconditions: I can only complete bed dependent assessment for a sepsis encounter A using a bed B if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the primary assignment for A is confirmed and the bed B is assigned to the encounter A
I can only complete bed dependent assessment for a sepsis encounter A using a bed B if it is not the case that the nursing assessment for A is completed
effects: Once I complete bed dependent assessment for a sepsis encounter A using a bed B, it is the case that the nursing assessment for A is completed

nurse_initial_assessment.description: perform nurse initial assessment for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B
preconditions: I can only perform nurse initial assessment for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the primary assignment for A is confirmed and the nurse B is available
I can only perform nurse initial assessment for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B if it is not the case that the nursing assessment for A is completed
effects: Once I perform nurse initial assessment for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B, it is the case that the nursing assessment for A is completed and the sample is pending collection for A
Once I perform nurse initial assessment for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B, it is not the case anymore that the nurse B is available

phlebotomy_collect_specimen.description: collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B using a phlebotomy station C
preconditions: I can only collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B using a phlebotomy station C if it is the case that the nursing assessment for A is completed and the primary assignment for A is confirmed and the bed B is assigned to the encounter A and the phlebotomy station C is available
I can only collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B using a phlebotomy station C if it is not the case that the specimen for A is collected
effects: Once I collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B using a phlebotomy station C, it is the case that the specimen for A is collected
Once I collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B using a phlebotomy station C, it is not the case anymore that the sample is pending collection for A

collect_specimen_with_pack.description: collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A using an antibiotic pack B
preconditions: I can only collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A using an antibiotic pack B if it is the case that the primary assignment for A is confirmed and B is linked to A
I can only collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A using an antibiotic pack B if it is not the case that the specimen for A is collected
effects: Once I collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A using an antibiotic pack B, it is the case that the specimen for A is collected
Once I collect specimen for a sepsis encounter A using an antibiotic pack B, it is not the case anymore that the sample is pending collection for A

reserve_medication.description: reserve a medication formulation B for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve a medication formulation B for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the medication B is available and the medication B is compatible with the encounter A
effects: Once I reserve a medication formulation B for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a medication formulation B for a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the medication B is available

release_medication.description: release a medication formulation B from a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a medication formulation B from a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a medication formulation B from a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the medication B is available
Once I release a medication formulation B from a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_supply.description: reserve a supply B for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve a supply B for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the supply B is available and the supply B is compatible with the encounter A
effects: Once I reserve a supply B for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that supply reserved A B
Once I reserve a supply B for a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the supply B is available

release_supply.description: release a supply B from a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a supply B from a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that supply reserved A B
effects: Once I release a supply B from a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the supply B is available
Once I release a supply B from a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that supply reserved A B

reserve_device.description: reserve a device resource B for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve a device resource B for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the device B is available and the device B is compatible with the encounter A
effects: Once I reserve a device resource B for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a device resource B for a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the device B is available

release_device.description: release a device resource B from a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a device resource B from a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a device resource B from a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the device B is available
Once I release a device resource B from a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_culture_media.description: reserve a culture media B for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve a culture media B for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the culture media B is available and the culture media B is compatible with the encounter A
effects: Once I reserve a culture media B for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a culture media B for a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the culture media B is available

release_culture_media.description: release a culture media B from a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a culture media B from a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a culture media B from a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the culture media B is available
Once I release a culture media B from a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

place_diagnostic_and_allocate_resources.description: place diagnostic a diagnostic test B and allocate resources a medication formulation C and a supply D for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only place diagnostic a diagnostic test B and allocate resources a medication formulation C and a supply D for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the primary assignment for A is confirmed and C is reserved for A and supply reserved A D and the test B is available and the test type B is compatible with the encounter A

I can only place diagnostic a diagnostic test B and allocate resources a medication formulation C and a supply D for a sepsis encounter A if it is not the case that the diagnostic order is finalized for A
effects: Once I place diagnostic a diagnostic test B and allocate resources a medication formulation C and a supply D for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that B test is ordered for A and the diagnostic order is finalized for A
Once I place diagnostic a diagnostic test B and allocate resources a medication formulation C and a supply D for a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the test B is available

place_diagnostic_with_device_and_contain.description: place diagnostic a diagnostic test B with a device resource C and a specimen container D for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only place diagnostic a diagnostic test B with a device resource C and a specimen container D for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the primary assignment for A is confirmed and C is reserved for A and the container D is available and the test B is available and the test type B is compatible with the encounter A and the container D is compatible with the encounter A
I can only place diagnostic a diagnostic test B with a device resource C and a specimen container D for a sepsis encounter A if it is not the case that the diagnostic order is finalized for A
effects: Once I place diagnostic a diagnostic test B with a device resource C and a specimen container D for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that B test is ordered for A and the diagnostic order is finalized for A and the specimen for A is verified and the sample is pending collection for A

Once I place diagnostic a diagnostic test B with a device resource C and a specimen container D for a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the test B is available and it is not the case anymore that the container D is available

finalize_diagnostic_order.description: finalize diagnostic order for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B and a supply C
preconditions: I can only finalize diagnostic order for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B and a supply C if it is the case that the diagnostic order is finalized for A and the specimen for A is verified and B is reserved for A and supply reserved A C
effects: Once I finalize diagnostic order for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B and a supply C, it is not the case anymore that the specimen for A is verified and it is not the case anymore that the sample is pending collection for A

perform_bundle_nursing_actions.description: perform bundle nursing actions for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B, a supply C, and a bedside sepsis nurse D
preconditions: I can only perform bundle nursing actions for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B, a supply C, and a bedside sepsis nurse D if it is the case that the specimen for A is collected and the diagnostic order is finalized for A and B is reserved for A and supply reserved A C and the support role D is compatible with the encounter A

I can only perform bundle nursing actions for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B, a supply C, and a bedside sepsis nurse D if it is not the case that the sample is pending collection for A and it is not the case that the bundle is ready for execution for A
effects: Once I perform bundle nursing actions for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B, a supply C, and a bedside sepsis nurse D, it is the case that the bundle is ready for execution for A

perform_bundle_pharmacy_actions.description: perform bundle pharmacy actions for a sepsis encounter A with a device resource B, a culture media C, and a clinical pharmacist D
preconditions: I can only perform bundle pharmacy actions for a sepsis encounter A with a device resource B, a culture media C, and a clinical pharmacist D if it is the case that the specimen for A is collected and the diagnostic order is finalized for A and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A and the support role D is compatible with the encounter A

I can only perform bundle pharmacy actions for a sepsis encounter A with a device resource B, a culture media C, and a clinical pharmacist D if it is not the case that the bundle is ready for execution for A
effects: Once I perform bundle pharmacy actions for a sepsis encounter A with a device resource B, a culture media C, and a clinical pharmacist D, it is the case that the bundle is ready for execution for A and the sample is pending collection for A

confirm_bundle_component_administered.description: confirm bundle component administered for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B and a supply C
preconditions: I can only confirm bundle component administered for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B and a supply C if it is the case that the bundle is ready for execution for A and the sample is pending collection for A and B is reserved for A and supply reserved A C
effects: Once I confirm bundle component administered for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B and a supply C, it is the case that the bundle was administered during A

Once I confirm bundle component administered for a sepsis encounter A with a medication formulation B and a supply C, it is not the case anymore that the sample is pending collection for A and it is not the case anymore that the specimen for A is collected and it is not the case anymore that the specimen for A is verified

recollect_specimen_at_station.description: recollect specimen for a sepsis encounter A at a phlebotomy station C with a bed B
preconditions: I can only recollect specimen for a sepsis encounter A at a phlebotomy station C with a bed B if it is the case that the bundle was administered during A and the bundle is ready for execution for A and the primary assignment for A is confirmed and the bed B is assigned to the encounter A and the phlebotomy station C is available
I can only recollect specimen for a sepsis encounter A at a phlebotomy station C with a bed B if it is not the case that the specimen for A is collected
effects: Once I recollect specimen for a sepsis encounter A at a phlebotomy station C with a bed B, it is the case that the specimen for A is collected

authorize_administration_at_bed.description: authorize administration for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B
preconditions: I can only authorize administration for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B if it is the case that the bundle is ready for execution for A and the specimen for A is collected and the bed B is assigned to the encounter A

I can only authorize administration for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B if it is not the case that the sample is pending collection for A and it is not the case that administration is authorized for A
effects: Once I authorize administration for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B, it is the case that administration is authorized for A

authorize_administration_with_nurse.description: authorize administration for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B
preconditions: I can only authorize administration for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B if it is the case that the bundle is ready for execution for A and the specimen for A is collected and the nurse B is available

I can only authorize administration for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B if it is not the case that the sample is pending collection for A and it is not the case that administration is authorized for A
effects: Once I authorize administration for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B, it is the case that administration is authorized for A
Once I authorize administration for a sepsis encounter A with a nurse B, it is not the case anymore that the nurse B is available

reserve_antibiotic_pack_for_encounter.description: reserve an antibiotic pack B for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve an antibiotic pack B for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that administration is authorized for A and the antibiotic pack B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve an antibiotic pack B for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the antibiotic B is reserved for the encounter A
Once I reserve an antibiotic pack B for a sepsis encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the antibiotic pack B is available

activate_cross_encounter_antibiotic_link.description: activate cross encounter antibiotic link between a pediatric encounter A and an adult encounter B using an antibiotic pack C
preconditions: I can only activate cross encounter antibiotic link between a pediatric encounter A and an adult encounter B using an antibiotic pack C if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the encounter A has a pediatric flag and C is compatible with A and the antibiotic C is reserved for the encounter B
I can only activate cross encounter antibiotic link between a pediatric encounter A and an adult encounter B using an antibiotic pack C if it is not the case that C is linked to A
effects: Once I activate cross encounter antibiotic link between a pediatric encounter A and an adult encounter B using an antibiotic pack C, it is the case that C is linked to A

send_pharmacy_notification.description: send pharmacy notification for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B using a phlebotomy station C
preconditions: I can only send pharmacy notification for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B using a phlebotomy station C if it is the case that the encounter A is triggered and the encounter A has a pediatric flag and the specimen for A is collected and administration is authorized for A and the bed B is assigned to the encounter A and the phlebotomy station C is available
I can only send pharmacy notification for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B using a phlebotomy station C if it is not the case that the pharmacy is notified about A
effects: Once I send pharmacy notification for a sepsis encounter A at a bed B using a phlebotomy station C, it is the case that the pharmacy is notified about A

finalize_and_mark_bundle_completed.description: finalize and mark bundle completed for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only finalize and mark bundle completed for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A has an adult flag and the encounter A is triggered and the primary assignment for A is confirmed and the diagnostic order is finalized for A and the bundle is ready for execution for A and administration is authorized for A and the specimen for A is collected
I can only finalize and mark bundle completed for a sepsis encounter A if it is not the case that the bundle is completed for A
effects: Once I finalize and mark bundle completed for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the bundle is completed for A

activate_antibiotic_and_finalize.description: activate an antibiotic pack B and finalize for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only activate an antibiotic pack B and finalize for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A has a pediatric flag and the encounter A is triggered and the primary assignment for A is confirmed and the diagnostic order is finalized for A and the bundle is ready for execution for A and administration is authorized for A and the specimen for A is collected and B is linked to A
I can only activate an antibiotic pack B and finalize for a sepsis encounter A if it is not the case that the bundle is completed for A
effects: Once I activate an antibiotic pack B and finalize for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the bundle is completed for A

pharmacy_finalize_and_mark_completed.description: pharmacy finalize and mark completed for a sepsis encounter A
preconditions: I can only pharmacy finalize and mark completed for a sepsis encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A has a pediatric flag and the encounter A is triggered and the primary assignment for A is confirmed and the diagnostic order is finalized for A and the bundle is ready for execution for A and administration is authorized for A and the specimen for A is collected and the pharmacy is notified about A
I can only pharmacy finalize and mark completed for a sepsis encounter A if it is not the case that the bundle is completed for A
effects: Once I pharmacy finalize and mark completed for a sepsis encounter A, it is the case that the bundle is completed for A

action_nl_templates.activate_sepsis_encounter: activate sepsis encounter for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.assign_primary_physician: assign physician {?provider} as primary physician to sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.unassign_primary_physician: unassign physician {?provider} from primary physician role for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.complete_bed_dependent_assessment: complete bed-dependent assessment for sepsis encounter {?encounter} using bed {?bed}
action_nl_templates.nurse_initial_assessment: perform nurse initial assessment for sepsis encounter {?encounter} with nurse {?nurse}
action_nl_templates.phlebotomy_collect_specimen: collect specimen for sepsis encounter {?encounter} at bed {?bed} using phlebotomy station {?station}
action_nl_templates.collect_specimen_with_pack: collect specimen for sepsis encounter {?encounter} using antibiotic pack {?antibiotic_pack}
action_nl_templates.reserve_medication: reserve medication formulation {?medication} for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.release_medication: release medication formulation {?medication} from sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.reserve_device: reserve device resource {?device} for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.release_device: release device resource {?device} from sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.reserve_culture_media: reserve culture media {?culture_media} for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.release_culture_media: release culture media {?culture_media} from sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.place_diagnostic_and_allocate_resources: place diagnostic diagnostic test {?test_type} and allocate resources medication formulation {?medication} and supply {?supply} for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.place_diagnostic_with_device_and_contain: place diagnostic diagnostic test {?test_type} with device resource {?device} and specimen container {?container} for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.finalize_diagnostic_order: finalize diagnostic order for sepsis encounter {?encounter} with medication formulation {?medication} and supply {?supply}
action_nl_templates.perform_bundle_nursing_actions: perform bundle nursing actions for sepsis encounter {?encounter} with medication formulation {?medication}, supply {?supply}, and bedside sepsis nurse {?bedside_sepsis_nurse}
action_nl_templates.perform_bundle_pharmacy_actions: perform bundle pharmacy actions for sepsis encounter {?encounter} with device resource {?device}, culture media {?culture_media}, and clinical pharmacist {?clinical_pharmacist}
action_nl_templates.confirm_bundle_component_administered: confirm bundle component administered for sepsis encounter {?encounter} with medication formulation {?medication} and supply {?supply}
action_nl_templates.recollect_specimen_at_station: recollect specimen for sepsis encounter {?encounter} at phlebotomy station {?station} with bed {?bed}
action_nl_templates.authorize_administration_at_bed: authorize administration for sepsis encounter {?encounter} at bed {?bed}
action_nl_templates.authorize_administration_with_nurse: authorize administration for sepsis encounter {?encounter} with nurse {?nurse}
action_nl_templates.reserve_antibiotic_pack_for_encounter: reserve antibiotic pack {?antibiotic_pack} for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.activate_cross_encounter_antibiotic_link: activate cross encounter antibiotic link between pediatric encounter {?pediatric_encounter} and adult encounter {?adult_encounter} using antibiotic pack {?antibiotic_pack}
action_nl_templates.send_pharmacy_notification: send pharmacy notification for sepsis encounter {?encounter} at bed {?bed} using phlebotomy station {?station}
action_nl_templates.finalize_and_mark_bundle_completed: finalize and mark bundle completed for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.activate_antibiotic_and_finalize: activate antibiotic pack {?antibiotic_pack} and finalize for sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates.pharmacy_finalize_and_mark_completed: pharmacy finalize and mark completed for sepsis encounter {?encounter}

predicate_nl_templates.assigned_physician: the physician {?provider} is assigned to the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.primary_assignment_confirmed: the primary assignment for {?encounter} is confirmed
predicate_nl_templates.nursing_assessment_completed: the nursing assessment for {?encounter} is completed
predicate_nl_templates.diagnostic_order_finalized: the diagnostic order is finalized for {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.bundle_ready_for_execution: the bundle is ready for execution for {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.sample_pending_collection: the sample is pending collection for {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.physician_compatible_with_encounter: the physician {?provider} is compatible with the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.test_compatible_with_encounter: the test type {?test_type} is compatible with the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.medication_compatible_with_encounter: the medication {?medication} is compatible with the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.supply_compatible_with_encounter: the supply {?supply} is compatible with the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.device_compatible_with_encounter: the device {?device} is compatible with the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.container_compatible_with_encounter: the container {?container} is compatible with the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.culture_media_compatible_with_encounter: the culture media {?culture_media} is compatible with the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.support_role_compatible_with_encounter: the support role {?clinical_support} is compatible with the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.antibiotic_reserved_for_encounter: the antibiotic {?antibiotic_pack} is reserved for the encounter {?encounter}
predicate_nl_templates.adult_encounter_flag: the encounter {?encounter} has an adult flag
predicate_nl_templates.pediatric_encounter_flag: the encounter {?encounter} has a pediatric flag
predicate_nl_templates.bed_assigned: the bed {?bed} is assigned to the encounter {?encounter}

action_nl_templates_indef.activate_sepsis_encounter: activate sepsis encounter for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_primary_physician: assign a physician {?provider} as primary physician to a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_primary_physician: unassign a physician {?provider} from primary physician role for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_bed: assign a bed {?bed} to a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_bed: release a bed {?bed} from a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_bed_dependent_assessment: complete bed-dependent assessment for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} using a bed {?bed}
action_nl_templates_indef.nurse_initial_assessment: perform nurse initial assessment for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} with a nurse {?nurse}
action_nl_templates_indef.phlebotomy_collect_specimen: collect specimen for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} at a bed {?bed} using a phlebotomy station {?station}
action_nl_templates_indef.collect_specimen_with_pack: collect specimen for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} using an antibiotic pack {?antibiotic_pack}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_medication: reserve a medication formulation {?medication} for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_medication: release a medication formulation {?medication} from a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_supply: reserve a supply {?supply} for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_supply: release a supply {?supply} from a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_device: reserve a device resource {?device} for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_device: release a device resource {?device} from a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_culture_media: reserve a culture media {?culture_media} for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_culture_media: release a culture media {?culture_media} from a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.place_diagnostic_and_allocate_resources: place diagnostic a diagnostic test {?test_type} and allocate resources a medication formulation {?medication} and a supply {?supply} for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.place_diagnostic_with_device_and_contain: place diagnostic a diagnostic test {?test_type} with a device resource {?device} and a specimen container {?container} for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_diagnostic_order: finalize diagnostic order for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} with a medication formulation {?medication} and a supply {?supply}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_bundle_nursing_actions: perform bundle nursing actions for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} with a medication formulation {?medication}, a supply {?supply}, and a bedside sepsis nurse {?bedside_sepsis_nurse}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_bundle_pharmacy_actions: perform bundle pharmacy actions for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} with a device resource {?device}, a culture media {?culture_media}, and a clinical pharmacist {?clinical_pharmacist}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_bundle_component_administered: confirm bundle component administered for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} with a medication formulation {?medication} and a supply {?supply}
action_nl_templates_indef.recollect_specimen_at_station: recollect specimen for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} at a phlebotomy station {?station} with a bed {?bed}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_administration_at_bed: authorize administration for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} at a bed {?bed}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_administration_with_nurse: authorize administration for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} with a nurse {?nurse}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_antibiotic_pack_for_encounter: reserve an antibiotic pack {?antibiotic_pack} for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.activate_cross_encounter_antibiotic_link: activate cross encounter antibiotic link between a pediatric encounter {?pediatric_encounter} and an adult encounter {?adult_encounter} using an antibiotic pack {?antibiotic_pack}
action_nl_templates_indef.send_pharmacy_notification: send pharmacy notification for a sepsis encounter {?encounter} at a bed {?bed} using a phlebotomy station {?station}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_and_mark_bundle_completed: finalize and mark bundle completed for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.activate_antibiotic_and_finalize: activate an antibiotic pack {?antibiotic_pack} and finalize for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}
action_nl_templates_indef.pharmacy_finalize_and_mark_completed: pharmacy finalize and mark completed for a sepsis encounter {?encounter}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a sepsis encounter or a physician or a diagnostic test or a supply or a medication formulation or a device resource or a bed or a nurse or a antibiotic pack or a phlebotomy station or a specimen container or a culture media or a clinical support is also a object
Everything that is a bedside sepsis nurse or a clinical pharmacist is also a clinical support
Everything that is a adult encounter or a pediatric encounter is also a sepsis encounter
